mapper.select: select report_id, report_type, target_id, target_title, reporter_name, status, report_time, handle_result, handle_remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from reports where report_id = #{reportId} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update reports set report_type = #{reportType}, target_id = #{targetId}, target_title = #{targetTitle}, reporter_name = #{reporterName}, status = #{status}, report_time = #{reportTime}, handle_result = #{handleResult}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where report_id = #{reportId} and deleted = false
